name: User Input Node
description: Adds a workflow node that pauses the run and prompts the user for values — the same native popup as the built-in User input node — then runs plugin code over the collected values.

nodes.label: User Input
nodes.description: Pauses the run, prompts the user for name and email, and writes them to runtime variables.

fields.label: Trim whitespace
fields.description: Strip leading/trailing whitespace from the submitted values.

input.message: Enter the details for this run
